calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Lykken for petitioner David Lore (via CourtCall.)

The Court observed that there were two issues of concern: the deposit of estate funds into a non-interest bearing trust account, and the request for extraordinary fees for services which were normal estate administration functions. Mr. Lykken stated that his client was located in Georgia and had experienced health issues which limited his ability to perform his responsibilities. He stated that the estate funds had been placed in the trust account as his client had not been able to deposit them in an otherwise appropriate accouunt. The Court granted the petition subject to review of the order and with the elimination of the requested extraordinary fees.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
